en: Elon's definitely shown a willingness to tweak Twitter's algorithm to drive certain kinds of content,
ko: 일론은 트위터 알고리즘을 조작해서 특정 콘텐츠를 밀어붙이려는 의지를 확실히 보여줬어.

en: and sometimes for truly embarrassing reasons.
There's a notorious incident involving him going to the Super Bowl in 2023
ko: 가끔은 정말 창피한 이유로. 2023년 슈퍼볼에 가서 자기 트윗 때문에 문제가 생긴 악명 높은 사건이 있어.

en: and having a problem with one of his tweets, and I'll let this reporter fill you in.
ko: 이 기자가 설명해줄게. 그는 기본적으로 필라델피아 이글스를 응원하는 트윗을 올렸어. 미국 국기 몇 개와 함께 "가자 이글스"라고.

en: He tweets out basically a support for the Philadelphia Eagles.
I think his tweet was something like, go Eagles, with a few American flags on it.
Biden, around the same time, posts a somewhat similar tweet.
ko: 바이든도 비슷한 시간에 비슷한 트윗을 올렸어.

en: Fly Eagles fly, and it's a video of his wife, Jill Biden, who's walking with an Eagles jersey on.
ko: "날아라 이글스" 그리고 질 바이든이 이글스 유니폼을 입고 걷는 영상이었어.

en: The game goes on, Elon Musk checks his phone.
ko: 경기가 진행되고 일론 머스크가 폰을 확인했어.

en: Weird, it looks like Joe Biden, who he's called a damp sock puppet in human form,
ko: 이상하게도 그가 "축축한 양말 인형"이라고 불렀던 조 바이든이 비슷한 트윗에서 참여도가 훨씬 높았어.

en: is doing much better than he is in terms of engagement on this very similar tweet.
ko: 새벽 2시 36분에 긴급 메시지가 나갔고 약 80명의 엔지니어가 소집됐어.

en: At 2.36 a.m., she says an urgent message went out,
and roughly 80 engineers were pulled into work.
ko: 알고리즘 문제를 고치라는 임무를 받고. 그게 사실이야.

en: And they're tasked with fixing the issues with the algorithm.
ko: 일론의 트윗이 바이든보다 참여도가 낮아서 새벽 2시에 80명의 엔지니어를 불러서 초긴급이라고 했어.

en: That's true. Elon's tweets got less engagement than Biden's did,
so 80 engineers were called in at two in the morning and told, this is high urgency.
ko: 물론 그의 트윗이 망한 건 당연해. 첫째 이글 이모지가 있는데 왜 미국 국기를 쓰냐고,

en: And of course his tweet flopped. It was terrible.
ko: 그리고 이글스라니? 왜 정식 이름을 써? 그냥 "가자 새들" 이글 이모지, "제일런 허츠 매일 밀어줘도 돼" 하면 백만 좋아요 바로였을 텐데.

en: First, don't use American flags when eagle emojis exist, but also, Eagles?
Why call them by their government name? Just post, go birds, eagle emojis,
ko: 나중에 기자들이 알아낸 바로는 머스크가 남은 엔지니어들을 해고하겠다고 위협한 후 그의 트윗만 전체 사용자에게

en: Jalen Hutz can give me a tush push any day, and you'd have cracked a million likes instantly.
Now, reporters later learned that after Musk threatened to fire his remaining engineers,
ko: 포춘이 실험했을 때 12개의 테스트 계정을 만들었는데 세션의 약 90%에서

en: they built a system designed to ensure that he, and he alone, benefited from previously unheard of promotion
of his tweets to the entire user base, which seems to be happening.
ko: 머스크의 게시물이 최소 한 번은 타임라인에 나타났대.

en: As basically, whatever Elon's tweeting about, people will see it in their feeds.
ko: "일론 머스크에 관심 없음"을 눌러도 안 바뀌었어. 사실 한 테스트 계정이 그걸 누른 후에

en: When Fortune conducted an experiment to gauge how prevalent Musk was on Twitter,
ko: 그의 게시물이 두 배 이상 늘었어.

en: they set up a dozen different test accounts, and in approximately 90% of the sessions they conducted,
a post from Musk appeared at least once in the timeline, usually much more often.
ko: 일론 머스크 소식을 절대 듣고 싶지 않으면 선택지는 하나뿐인 것 같아. 그의 가장 쿨한 자녀가 되는 거.

en: And even clicking, not interested in Elon Musk, didn't change things.
In fact, after one test account clicked exactly that, posts from him more than doubled.
At this point, it seems like there's only one option if you never want to hear anything from Elon Musk,
and that's to be his coolest child.
